description_long: This is a rectangular, body-length pillow with a white base fabric featuring a large, detailed anime-style illustration of a girl in a red and black frilled dress with long black hair styled in twin tails. The illustration covers the majority of the pillow's front and back surfaces, with the character depicted in slightly different poses on each side. The pillow appears to be soft and plush, likely filled with synthetic fiber or similar material, giving it a slightly rounded, cushioned appearance. The edges are smooth and the surface is matte, with no visible seams, tags, or brand logos. The pillow is clean and well-maintained, with no visible stains or signs of wear. It is shown isolated against a plain background, with no contextual placement.
description: A large, white body pillow featuring a detailed anime character illustration in red and black, with a soft, plush appearance and clean surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the anime girl in a red and black dress, facing forward with clear details of her outfit and hair.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's slim profile and thickness, with only a hint of the printed illustration visible along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a similar anime character illustration, with the character in a slightly different pose and the dress details still prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pillow's thickness and a partial glimpse of the illustration, mirroring the other side.
